# Schedule

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. The structure below is a placeholder layout that you can later replace with the real program.

| Time | Monday | Tuesday | Wednesday | Thursday | Friday |
|------------|------------|------------|------------|------------|------------|
| 09:00–10:30 | Opening session | Morning workshop | Keynote lecture | Thematic seminar | Group presentations |
| 10:45–12:15 | Lecture block | Breakout session | Studio format | Hands-on lab | Closing reflections |
| 12:15–13:30 | Lunch break | Lunch break | Lunch break | Lunch break | Lunch break |
| 13:30–15:00 | Tutorial | Reading group | Applied exercise | Project work | Feedback session |
| 15:15–16:30 | Panel discussion | Open lab | Mentoring circle | Lightning talks | Farewell |

## Daily rhythm

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.

## Social activities

Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat.
